Notice Of Motion Andm Toion To Compel Depositions;
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN CAREY OF WILD CAREY & FIFE APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF ALLEN PURDY;
ATTY. JAMES F. HANNAWALT, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3913 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO;
ATTY. DAVID J. STOCK OF THE LAW OFFICES OF RANKIN, LANDNESS & STOCK, TEL. NO. (408) 293-0463 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT MEGAN PURDY;

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion for an order To Compel the subpoenaed Depositions of Plaintiff's psychological health care providers Hilda Kessler, Dr. Mackay and Dr. Kawachi - THE COURT PERMITTED DISCOVERY LIMITED TO INFORMATION CONCERNING THE ACCIDENT AND THEIR VIEWS AS TO THE EFFECT OF THE ACCIDENT ON HER MENTAL CONDITION BUT NOT CURRENT ISSUES AND TO PRECLUDE PAST PSYCHIATRIC HISTORY. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. =301/PJB
